deskripsi: Materi persiapan Tes Kemampuan Akademik (TKA) jenjang SMK yang berfokus pada English for Specific Purposes (ESP), komunikasi bisnis, dan pemahaman teks teknis.

daftarMateri.konten: Formal and informal greetings, introducing oneself in an interview, exchanging business cards, and basic networking vocabulary.
Understanding imperative sentences, sequence adverbs (first, then, finally), and vocabulary related to tools, safety, and machinery.
Writing formal emails, asking for information, handling complaints, and understanding the structure of a curriculum vitae (CV) in English.
Describing products, explaining work processes, interpreting charts and graphs, and making comparisons (degree of comparison).
Reporting what others said, understanding tense shifts, and practical usage in workplace communication and briefings.
